QueryExtension.Constraint: ( ( ${param.code} IS NULL OR CT.CODE LIKE UPPER(${param.code}) ) AND ( ${param.id} IS NULL OR CT.ID LIKE UPPER(${param.id}) ) AND ( ${param.districtregistry} IS NULL OR CT.DISTRICT_REGISTRY LIKE UPPER(${param.districtregistry}) ) AND ( ${param.courtName} IS NULL OR CT.NAME LIKE UPPER(${param.courtName}) ) )

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
